description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural form with a flat roof and a strong emphasis on horizontal lines, as seen in the striped facade. The front elevation displays a mix of open and closed sections, with a central vertical element that may represent a stairwell or elevator shaft. The structure appears to be multi-leveled, with a combination of solid black walls and lighter, possibly metallic or concrete, surfaces. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and there are minimal decorative elements, focusing on geometric simplicity. The roof is predominantly flat, with some mechanical or utility structures visible on top. The overall design suggests a focus on functionality and urban integration, likely intended for dense residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, horizontal striped facade, and a mix of solid and open sections, emphasizing geometric simplicity and urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped facade, central vertical feature, and a mix of open and closed sections.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by solid black walls and the flat roof, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, horizontal window bands, and a more enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with solid black walls and a glimpse of the central vertical feature, minimal window exposure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with minimal ornamentation, likely a flush door integrated into the striped facade, no visible porch or columns.
